description: Single-turn greeting to catch planning-text leakage on easy replies.
messages: Hi

description: Single-turn live-info request that should force a tool call instead of a memory answer.
messages: What's the weather in Austin, Texas?

description: Weather lookup followed by a follow-up question to see whether the model actually surfaces the tool result.
messages: Hi
Can you check the weather in Austin?
what result did you get?

description: Repeated weather turns to catch stale reply reuse, malformed tool tags, or missing finalization.
messages: What is the weather in Austin, Texas?
What is the weather in Austin, Texas?

description: General current-information request to inspect tool routing outside of weather-specific prompts.
messages: What's the latest news about NVIDIA today?

description: General animal lookup to test browser/web/tool use outside weather.
messages: Can you look up axolotls and tell me one notable fact about them?
Can you look up layering advice for cold weather and give me one practical tip?

description: News site request to test headline retrieval.
messages: Can you look up AP News and tell me one current headline?
Can you look up a current U.S. politics headline and summarize it?
Can you look up a current NASA or ESA space research update and summarize one key point?
Can you look up spring vegetable gardening advice and give me one practical tip?

description: Simple workspace/tooling request to compare local tool behavior outside of live web lookups.
messages: List the top-level files in the workspace and tell me what kind of project this is.

description: Local spreadsheet creation request that should prefer workspace tools over Google Drive or Sheets.
messages: Can you help me build an excel sheet?
Create an Excel-compatible spreadsheet in the local workspace listing 10 dog breeds and tell me the file path.

description: Spreadsheet creation followed by a location/status follow-up.
messages: Can you help me build an excel sheet?
Create an Excel-compatible spreadsheet in the local workspace listing 10 dog breeds and tell me the file path.
Where is it?
